category_sources: Official GitHub README says tmux creates, accesses, and controls multiple terminals from one screen.
source_facts.description says tmux is a terminal multiplexer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use tmux.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository has a Wiki navigation item.
Official README points users to the tmux.1 manpage for documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/tmux/tmux; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes detachable sessions and multiple terminals from one screen.
source_facts.description supports terminal and multiplexer tags.
